title: Replace virtualized list with windowing + intersection observer
author: mei
description: The experiments-list page was rendering 1k+ rows up-front and stuttering on scroll. Replaced react-window with a custom windowing impl backed by IntersectionObserver. Scroll FPS on a M1 Air went 22 → 60. Memory drop ~40MB on a full list. Tisha reviewed.

title: Add new merchant onboarding flow (frontend)
author: mei
description: Frontend for the new merchant onboarding flow. Multi-step form, optimistic submission, retry-on-502 (per Rayan's note in #frontend-help — fraud-scoring service has a cold-start issue).
